films.title: The Box
films.overview: Norma and Arthur Lewis, a suburban couple with a young child, receive a simple wooden box as a gift, which bears fatal and irrevocable consequences. A mysterious stranger delivers the message that the box promises to bestow upon its owner $1 million with the press of a button. However pressing this button will simultaneously cause the death of another human being somewhere in the world; someone they don't know. With just 24 hours to have the box in their possession, Norma and Arthur find themselves in the cross-hairs of a startling moral dilemma and must face the true nature of their humanity.

films.title: Choke
films.overview: A sex-addicted con-man pays for his mother's hospital bills by playing on the sympathies of those who rescue him from choking to death.

films.title: Walk of Shame
films.overview: A reporter's dream of becoming a news anchor is compromised after a one-night stand leaves her stranded in downtown L.A. without a phone, car, ID or money - and only 8 hours to make it to the most important job interview of her life.

films.title: Bad Milo!
films.overview: A horror comedy centered on a guy who learns that his unusual stomach problems are being caused by a demon living in his intestines.

films.title: Black or White
films.overview: A grieving widower is drawn into a custody battle over his granddaughter, whom he helped raise her entire life.

films.title: Hot Tub Time Machine 2
films.overview: After their first adventure with the Hot Tub Time Machine, Lou and Nick are living very well off their ill-gotten gains, while Jacob still cannot rely on Lou to be a positive role model. When an unknown assailant breaks into Lou's mansion and shoots him, Nick and Jacob take him for another trip in the hot tub. They emerge in the year 2025, where they must figure out who shot Lou and prevent it from happening again.

films.title: Life Partners
films.overview: A 29-year-old lawyer  and her lesbian best friend experience a dramatic shift in their longtime bond after one enters a serious relationship.

films.title: Visions
films.overview: After moving to a vineyard with her family, a pregnant woman experiences horrifying visions.

films.title: Don't Think Twice
films.overview: An improv group deals with several crises, including the loss of their lease and one member hitting the big time.

films.title: Life of the Party
films.overview: When her husband suddenly dumps her, longtime dedicated housewife Deanna turns regret into re-set by going back to college... landing in the same class and school as her daughter, who's not entirely sold on the idea. Plunging headlong into the campus experience, the increasingly outspoken Deanna – now Dee Rock – embraces freedom, fun, and frat boys on her own terms, finding her true self in a senior year no one ever expected.

films.title: Magic Camp
films.overview: Andy, at the urging of his former mentor and Magic Camp owner Roy Preston, returns to the camp of his youth hoping to reignite his career. Instead, he finds inspiration in his ragtag bunch of rookie magicians.

films.title: Ibiza
films.overview: She could do the responsible thing. Or she could go to Ibiza with her best friends to chase down a hot DJ. Easy choice.

films.title: Come Play
films.overview: Oliver, a lonely autistic boy, seeks solace and refuge in his ever-present cell phone and tablet. When a mysterious creature uses the boy's devices against him, his parents must fight to save their son from the monster beyond the screen.

films.title: Fear Street: 1978
films.overview: In 1978, two rival groups at Camp Nightwing must band together to solve a terrifying mystery when horrors from their towns' history come alive.

films.title: The Contractor
films.overview: After being involuntarily discharged from the U.S. Special Forces, James Harper decides to support his family by joining a private contracting organization alongside his best friend and under the command of a fellow veteran. Overseas on a covert mission, Harper must evade those trying to kill him while making his way back home.
